title: Tapping to Inspire Others Through My Wealth
subtitle: A tapping practice for releasing the fear that financial success makes others uncomfortable, and landing in the generous, open expression of a life well-built
excerpt: A five-minute tapping practice from Day 82 of a 12-week money programme. The script works with the old habit of hiding success or dimming it to protect others, and moves toward the open, encouraging example of a life built with money and shared generously.
sourceNotes: The tapping framework is Gary Craig's Emotional Freedom Technique (EFT), in use since the mid-1990s. The script is adapted from Day 82 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program to Attract Cash, Overflow & Abundance Without Hustle or Burnout (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798268793796).

practice.whenToUse: Use when you feel the pull to hide or soften financial success around others, or when you worry that your abundance will make people feel judged or left behind.

content.text: A five-minute tapping practice from Day 82 of a 12-week money programme. Week 12 theme: live abundance as normal. Day 82 addresses the old habit of muting success out of fear of envy or judgment, and works toward the open, encouraging example of someone who thrives without apology.
New to tapping? Read
how EFT tapping works
first.
The practice
Karate chop
Even though I once felt shy about success, I deeply and completely accept myself.
Even though I feared others might judge or envy, I deeply and completely accept myself.
Even though I sometimes hid what I'd built, I deeply and completely accept myself.
Tapping round
Eyebrow: I'm ready to share my story openly.
Side of eye: my journey can help others believe.
Under eye: I inspire by living my truth.
Under nose: I show that wealth can be calm and kind.
Chin: I let my abundance encourage hope.
Collarbone: I love watching others open up.
Under arm: I give by example as much as by gifts.
Top of head: I let my wealth inspire and encourage.
Reframe to positive
Eyebrow: my success lifts others higher.
Side of eye: I show what's possible with clarity and care.
Under eye: I encourage people to reach further.
Under nose: I teach through living my abundance.
Chin: I spread confidence and generosity.
Collarbone: I help others trust their own wealth path.
Under arm: I share my story to show a new vision.
Top of head: I inspire simply by thriving.
Tap each round three times, then move to the reframe and tap that three times.
Where this practice comes from

The tapping framework is Gary Craig's Emotional Freedom Technique (EFT), developed in the mid-1990s from Roger Callahan's Thought Field Therapy. The script is adapted from Day 82 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
